return_1d.description: One-day historical return from close price (pct_change(1), grouped by ticker)

return_5d.description: Five-day historical return from close price (pct_change(5), grouped by ticker)

volatility_20d.description: Historical 20-day rolling std of return_1d (past window only, grouped by ticker)

turnover_20d.description: Historical 20-day rolling mean of turnover (past window only, grouped by ticker)

pe.description: P/E ratio, as-of aligned by announce_date (NOT report_date) to avoid look-ahead bias

pb.description: P/B ratio, as-of aligned by announce_date (NOT report_date) to avoid look-ahead bias

roe.description: ROE, as-of aligned by announce_date (NOT report_date) to avoid look-ahead bias

label_next_5d.description: Future 5-day return = close.shift(-5)/close-1; MUST be excluded from feature columns

source_price_available.description: Whether price source exists for the row

source_fundamental_available.description: Whether pe/pb/roe at least one is non-null

announce_date.description: Announce date of the as-of matched fundamental record (for audit)
